text.title: Eval-Driven Development: TDD for AI Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals from inputs to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml for eval-driven-development-tdd-for-ai.

decision-tree.root-question: Does the PR touch prompt / model / retrieval / tool schema?

conclusion.verdict: PASS — TDD-for-AI not required for this PR
BLOCK — PR template requires eval-delta line
BLOCK — investigate and mitigate before merge
SUNSET — rebuild suite before relying on it for gates
skip — preconditions in Applies-If not met

text.example: preconditions met → first branch matches → conclusion ref resolves to a rule in 01-core-rules.xml.
